author: anon-13168fa2
content: Delivered: Created 03-real-world-skills/01-the-workshop.md. Covers: why working in existing code is different from greenfield, intro to guild-toolkit (all 9 crates with difficulty ratings in a table), how it's different from portfolio projects (architecture you didn't choose, conventions to follow, other people's code, building for an audience), getting started guide (clone, build, explore, read guild-core, pick a tool), the 6-step contribution process (claim, read, design, build layers, submit PR, ship), what it teaches (reading code, working within constraints, collaboration, PR process, building for others), 4 exercises. Updated README: moved Workshop to first in Phase 3 since it should come before API/architecture work, updated projects table.
